text:
Once upon a gentle breeze in a faraway forest, there was a little flower named Lily who had just bloomed for the first time. Her petals were soft and pink, and she stood tall and proud in her garden of wildflowers. But Lily felt lonely; she longed for company.

One sunny morning, a small, fluffy white rabbit hopped through the meadow and caught sight of Lily. The rabbit's fur was soft as cotton, and his ears twitched with curiosity. He approached Lily with a gentle hop and said, "Hello, beautiful flower! I'm Breeze. Why do you look so sad?"

Lily tilted her head to one side and replied, "I feel alone here. There's no one else around to talk to or play with."

Breeze smiled kindly and suggested, "Why don't we be friends? I can tell you stories and we can explore the forest together!"

From that day on, Lily and Breeze were inseparable. They would spend
